scripts.build:dev: node scripts/bump-version.js patch dev && ng build --configuration development
scripts.build:dev:minor: node scripts/bump-version.js minor dev && ng build --configuration development
scripts.build:dev:major: node scripts/bump-version.js major dev && ng build --configuration development
scripts.build:test: node scripts/bump-version.js patch test && ng build --configuration development
scripts.build:test:minor: node scripts/bump-version.js minor test && ng build --configuration development
scripts.build:test:major: node scripts/bump-version.js major test && ng build --configuration development
scripts.build:prod: node scripts/bump-version.js patch prod && ng build --configuration production
scripts.build:prod:minor: node scripts/bump-version.js minor prod && ng build --configuration production
scripts.build:prod:major: node scripts/bump-version.js major prod && ng build --configuration production
